title: Alert Trends
description: Predictive alert frequency analysis -- rising, stable, or falling trends across the fleet and per vessel.

links.title: Ship Operations (Legacy)
links.tooltip: Legacy telemetry demo mapped to vessel_001 / MV Edge Aurora

links.title: Fleet Overview
links.tooltip: Fleet-wide UDS health and correlation view

links.title: NOC Support
links.tooltip: Broader troubleshooting view used by NOC operators

links.title: AI Chat
links.tooltip: Ask the AI assistant about fleet, incidents, or specific vessels

list.name: vessel
list.label: Vessel
list.query: SELECT name || ' (' || imo_nr || ')' AS __text, imo_nr AS __value FROM udslocations ORDER BY name;

panels.title: Alert Frequency Over Time
panels.description: Number of new alerts per 4-hour bucket. A rising pattern suggests worsening conditions.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time_bucket('4 hours', al.starts_at) AS time,
  COUNT(*)::int AS "Alert Count"
FROM alerts al
JOIN udslocations u ON u.id = al.uds_location_id
WHERE al.starts_at >= $__timeFrom()
  AND al.starts_at <= $__timeTo()
  AND ('${vessel:sqlstring}' = '' OR '${vessel:sqlstring}' = '$__all' OR u.imo_nr = '${vessel:sqlstring}')
  AND ('${severity:sqlstring}' = '' OR '${severity:sqlstring}' = '$__all' OR LOWER(al.severity) = LOWER('${severity:sqlstring}'))
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time ASC;

panels.title: Alert Frequency by Vessel
panels.description: Per-vessel alert counts over time to compare which vessels are trending worse.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time_bucket('4 hours', al.starts_at) AS time,
  u.name AS metric,
  COUNT(*)::int AS value
FROM alerts al
JOIN udslocations u ON u.id = al.uds_location_id
WHERE al.starts_at >= $__timeFrom()
  AND al.starts_at <= $__timeTo()
  AND ('${severity:sqlstring}' = '' OR '${severity:sqlstring}' = '$__all' OR LOWER(al.severity) = LOWER('${severity:sqlstring}'))
GROUP BY time, u.name
ORDER BY time ASC;

panels.title: Alert Severity Breakdown
panels.description: Distribution of alert severities over time. Watch for increasing critical alerts.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time_bucket('4 hours', al.starts_at) AS time,
  al.severity AS metric,
  COUNT(*)::int AS value
FROM alerts al
JOIN udslocations u ON u.id = al.uds_location_id
WHERE al.starts_at >= $__timeFrom()
  AND al.starts_at <= $__timeTo()
  AND ('${vessel:sqlstring}' = '' OR '${vessel:sqlstring}' = '$__all' OR u.imo_nr = '${vessel:sqlstring}')
GROUP BY time, al.severity
ORDER BY time ASC;

panels.title: Current Trend Summary
panels.description: Per-vessel rising / stable / falling judgement. Compares the most recent half of the dashboard time window against the earlier half. Honours the vessel and severity filters.

targets.rawSql:
WITH window AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AS t_from,
    $__timeTo()::timestamptz   AS t_to
),
buckets AS (
  SELECT
    u.name AS vessel,
    CASE
      WHEN al.starts_at >= (SELECT t_from + (t_to - t_from) / 2 FROM window) THEN 'recent'
      ELSE 'earlier'
    END AS period,
    COUNT(*)::int AS cnt
  FROM alerts al
  JOIN udslocations u ON u.id = al.uds_location_id
  WHERE al.starts_at >= (SELECT t_from FROM window)
    AND al.starts_at <= (SELECT t_to   FROM window)
    AND ('${vessel:sqlstring}' = '' OR '${vessel:sqlstring}' = '$__all' OR u.imo_nr = '${vessel:sqlstring}')
    AND ('${severity:sqlstring}' = '' OR '${severity:sqlstring}' = '$__all' OR LOWER(al.severity) = LOWER('${severity:sqlstring}'))
  GROUP BY u.name, period
)
SELECT
  vessel AS "Vessel",
  COALESCE(MAX(cnt) FILTER (WHERE period = 'earlier'), 0) AS "Alerts (earlier half)",
  COALESCE(MAX(cnt) FILTER (WHERE period = 'recent'),  0) AS "Alerts (recent half)",
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(MAX(cnt) FILTER (WHERE period = 'recent'),  0) +
         COALESCE(MAX(cnt) FILTER (WHERE period = 'earlier'), 0) < 4
      THEN 'INSUFFICIENT_DATA'
    WHEN COALESCE(MAX(cnt) FILTER (WHERE period = 'recent'),  0) >
         COALESCE(MAX(cnt) FILTER (WHERE period = 'earlier'), 0) * 1.25
      THEN 'RISING'
    WHEN COALESCE(MAX(cnt) FILTER (WHERE period = 'recent'),  0) <
         COALESCE(MAX(cnt) FILTER (WHERE period = 'earlier'), 0) * 0.75
      THEN 'FALLING'
    ELSE 'STABLE'
  END AS "Trend"
FROM buckets
GROUP BY vessel
ORDER BY vessel;
